clips.arabizi: Ok G, sma3ne mni7. Hayde el fikra ana w Dima tala3etlan yeha men shi sene senten bas nayyamna la2anno ma mna3ref na3mel app w neshteghil 3al mawdou3. Bas halla2 lama rje3et enta wa3aytelle fikret na3mel app tzakarta mbe7. Bro fi app bi Dubai esma The Secret Society. Ok? Hayde el app bro, el models wel influencers bifouto 3leya, bi le2o free drinks w discounted offers w kaza bel clubs, el bars, el pubs, el ma7allat lal influencers w 3ala hasab 3adad el followers. Yani masalan yalle 3anda aw 3ando 10k to 15k masalan hayda el offer, yalle 3ando 5k kaza hayda, bas they have to post akid bas yrou7o 3al ma7al. W 7atta 3ala zet el app el DJs byo2dro yle2o masalan akhbar bi bars, bi clubs, bi kaza. So fhemet shou el fikra. Esma The Secret Society w ma byi2balo 7ayalla 7ada. Halla2 ana mbe7 masalan 3abbayt my profile 3a The Secret Society, up to 24 hours ta ya3mlo review la my profile ka DJ ta o2dar fout 3al app ta nedresa lal app ana w yak w Dima. Yani halla2 ana nater ya3mloule accept, enno akid 7aya3mloule accept 7ay-shoufo el Insta. Halla2 henne byetlobo TikTok, TikTok ana 3ande zero posts shelton kellon bas enno 3ande el account, 7attayto. Ra7 yshoufo el Insta taba3e. Nshalla ye2baloune yani mesh la2anno ma fi TikTok ma ye2baloune. Bas anyway badna njarreb nshouf el app kif men jouwa. Halla2 mhem, el fikra yalle badna na3mela hon hiye a win-win lal kel. Yani badna na3mel app, awwal shi el fikra n3abbe tables bi models shabeb w banat bi Lebnen. Kif tle3na bel fikra? Men wara hayda Kee. Olna enno ya khaye kif w leh w kaza. Bro ana w Dima 3anna kel el database taba3 kel el models bi Lebnen. Yani hawde kellon Sara Samaha w Sara Shams w hayde Leticia w ma ba3ref shou, haw kellon kellon 3ande ye7on bro. Kellon ma3e ar2amon kellon wel Insta taba3on w kel shi bro. W Dima ma3a el data. Yani mbe7 rje3na shayyakna, hayde data ana jamma3ta bro men tlet snin 3melt shoot ma3 Dima, neket ekht el denye bi Lebnen w jebna data men 7ada w kabbarna 3leya w kaza. Anyway el database mawjoude, shabeb banat. W ana aslan 3ande aqwa benet bayneton kellon w aqwa shab bayneton kellon as7abe kamen be7kiyon yed3amo el mawdou3. So badna nshouf kif nrakkeba 3al add. Bas badna nesta3mel hayde el database kermal ne7na nballesh bi shi mu3ayyan, na3mel app enno ysiro el ma7allat masalan bya3mlo henne bundles lal influencers wel models yijo la 3andon. Yani masalan Kee Sabt, example ma 7atzabbat abel el Sabt bas 3am na3te example. Let's say el Sabt Kee mesh mashi ma7allo khaye, bya3mel bundle, bya3mel offer 3ala hayde el kaza enno lal models wel influencers masalan 50 dollar open bar masalan, mesh open regular bar, aw masalan open regular bar and you can choose any cocktail you want masalan bi 50 aw bi 40. Sa3eta bro enno kel haw el models 7ay-enbesto biyo la2anno elon 40-50 dollar mesh shi, dahrton deyman bi 150 w 200. So biyo henne bro byedfa3o 50 dollar byetla3lon open drinks w byetla3lon el cocktail taba3on ta yo2dro ysawro el story bi alb Kee Beirut kaza. Anyway fhemet el fikra. W hayda el shi mna3mlo ma3 kel el ma7allat. Yani khalas mnsir nebrom 3a kel el ma7allat w nkhalliyon ysiro henne members bi alb hal app. Halla2 badna nfaker kif el membership kif btsir, yani enno shou el UI yalle bishoufou el ma7allat, shou el UI yalle bishoufou el models, la2anno ma fiyon yfouto 3a zet el ma7al. Kif Toters bro? Enno fik tkoun enta ma7al b tbi3 akel w fik tfout ka customer teshtere. Houwe baddo ykoun metel Toters bas la hayda el mawdou3. Enno el models bifouto ka enno faytin 3a shi metel Toters, bisir yetla3lon el clubs wel ma7allat wel bars wel resorts w 3amlin hayda el shi. W men khilel hayda el shi ana bo2wa kamen la2anno ana owner hal app, halla2 ento kamen owners ma3e bas ana ka DJ 3am be7ke enno ana owner hayde el app, one of the co-founders of this app, so bisir kellon badon rdaye iza owyet hal app la2anno b-sir ana PR kamen. Yani 3am tefham hiye adde awiye bro neket ekhta. Halla2 ma ba3ref iza edert a3mellak el introduction bi tari2a 7elwe bas enno hayde el fikra. Akid badda ktir fine-tuning w badna ne23od w kaza w hek. So halla2 hal jem3a 7a-ne23od ana w yak w Dima w ne7ke bi hayda el mawdou3. Bas bro, I think enno it's an amazing idea. Yani ana ra2ye bro enno ktir awiye. W 7atta Dima bro ktir ktir m7ammase 3al mawdou3. Nef2a3on shi ktir hek 7elwe. Yani khalas shabeb walla banat models bifouto byenbesto. Ana rfi2e Anthony Labaki, art C43 AMG w Rolex hayde yalle kellna badna yeha w yalle baddak ye w cash w moto w kaza. Houwe model bro wel neswen bi dallo ma3o w hek. Bas ana ba3refo kif la2anno rfi2e bro ana enno ba3refo men ne7na w sghar. Bi gharamo enno ywafer bro. Haw el models wel influencers gharamon ywafero hal osas. Yani Anthony Labaki bro ana m2akkad enno 7ay-koun number one customer masalan 3al app. Khalas bi7eb ywafer el zalame. Bi7eb yrou7 ybayyen enno houwe pappas w kaza bas ma ykoun defe3 ktir. Birou7 3a boat houwe w as7abo w kaza byefta7le anninet Puccini 7a22a 13 dollar. Enno 7ell 3an ayre bro art Rolex efta7 champagne. 3am tefham shou azde? So ne7na bro badna ye7on ykouno hek la2anno ne7na badna el 3alam yalle bishilo ybayno bel ma7allat el mrattebe bas shou ykouno mwaffrin w tala3lon w kaza w ysawro el stories yalle henne bihemmom yzahro ysawrouhon w that's it bro. Yani w men-shouf kif mnewasse kamen ba3den. Kebret kebir hal mawdou3 mnfawwet osset el DJs w kaza kif enta kent 7abeb tfawwet el music bel mawdou3 through me. Dima kamen 7abbe ta3mel hayda el shi bas bi Lebnen khallina nballesh bel models wel PR eltella la Dima w mnerja3 mnekbar. Owyet el app bi hal tari2a mnfawwet services zyade.
clips.english: Okay G, listen to me carefully. This idea came to Dima and me about a year or two ago, but we put it on hold because we didn't know how to build an app or work on it. But now that you've brought up the idea of making an app, I remembered it yesterday. Bro, there's an app in Dubai called 'The Secret Society.' Okay? On this app, models and influencers join and find free drinks, discounted offers, etc., in clubs, bars, pubs, and venues for influencers based on their follower count. For example, someone with 10k to 15k followers gets this offer, someone with 5k gets that, but they definitely have to post when they go to the venue. Even on the same app, DJs can find news about bars, clubs, and so on. So you get the idea. It's called 'The Secret Society' and they don't accept just anyone. Yesterday, for instance, I filled out my profile on 'The Secret Society'; it takes up to 24 hours for them to review my profile as a DJ so I can access the app and study it with you and Dima. So now I'm waiting for them to accept me—they surely will once they see my Insta. They ask for TikTok; I have zero posts on TikTok, I removed them all, but I have the account so I put it in. They'll see my Insta. Hopefully they accept me even without TikTok posts. Anyway, we want to try and see the app from the inside. Now, importantly, the idea we want to do here is a win-win for everyone. We want to make an app; the first step is to fill tables with male and female models in Lebanon. How did we come up with the idea? It was because of Kee [Beirut]. We were saying, 'Man, how and why?' and so on. Bro, Dima and I have the entire database of all the models in Lebanon. All of them—Sara Samaha, Sara Shams, Leticia, and whoever else—I have them all, bro. I have all their numbers, their Instagrams, everything. And Dima has the data. We re-checked it yesterday; this is data I've been collecting for three years, bro. I did a shoot with Dima, it was huge in Lebanon, and we got data from someone and expanded on it. Anyway, the database exists—guys and girls. And I actually have the top girl and top guy among them as friends too, I can talk to them to support the project. So we need to see how to set it up properly. But we want to use this database so we can start with something specific, make an app where venues, for example, create bundles for influencers and models to come to them. For example, Kee on Saturday—it won't be ready by this Saturday, just an example. Let's say on Saturday Kee isn't doing well; they make a bundle or an offer on the app for models and influencers, like $50 for an open bar—not just a regular open bar, but maybe an open regular bar where you can choose any cocktail you want for $50 or $40. Then, bro, all these models will be happy to come because $40-$50 is nothing to them; their outings usually cost $150 to $200. So they come, pay $50, get open drinks and their cocktail so they can film a story inside Kee Beirut. You get the idea. And we do this with all the venues. We'll go around to all the places and have them become members on the app. Now we need to think about how the membership works—what's the UI the venues see, and what's the UI the models see, because they can't access the same section. Like Toters, bro? You can be a shop selling food or a customer buying. It should be like Toters but for this. Models log in like they're on something like Toters, and they see clubs, venues, bars, and resorts that have these offers. Through this, I'll get stronger too because I'm an owner of the app—you guys are owners with me too—but as a DJ, being a co-founder of this app means everyone will want to stay on my good side if the app takes off because I'll be a PR person too. You see how powerful this is, bro? It's insane. I don't know if I introduced it well, but that's the idea. It definitely needs a lot of fine-tuning and we need to sit down. This week, you, I, and Dima will sit and talk about it. But bro, I think it's an amazing idea. I think it's very strong. Even Dima is very excited. We'll launch something really cool. Male or female models will join and have a blast. My friend Anthony Labaki—drives a C43 AMG, has that Rolex we all want, cash, a motorcycle, etc. He's a model, bro, and women are always with him. But I know him well because we've been friends since we were kids. He loves to save money, bro. These models and influencers love to save on these things. I'm sure Anthony Labaki would be the number one customer on the app. The guy just loves to save. He likes to go out and look like a big shot but without spending much. He goes on a boat with his friends and opens a bottle of Puccini that costs $13. Like, come on bro, you have a Rolex, open some champagne! You get what I mean? So we want them to be like that because we want the people who 'carry' the vibe to be seen in the nice places, but they'll be saving money and getting perks and filming the stories they care about showing off. That's it, bro. And we'll see how to expand later. Once it grows, we can bring in the DJ aspect and how you wanted to integrate music through me. Dima wants to do that too, but I told her let's start with models and PR in Lebanon and then grow. Once the app is strong, we add more services.

clips.arabizi: W Dima bro tala3la fikra ba3ed ktir awiye, hayde masalan shaghle men el fine-tuning. Hayda el 3am ellak ye enno ba3ed ne7na badna ne23od w nzabbet el fikra, nsir men fikra la fikra la fikra ta to2wa el fikra. Masalan ma btkoun open spots, 3reft shou azde? Ma ne7na bro yalle mnet7akkam bel app. Mnsir ne7na na3ref kel ma7al kif ned3amo w kel ma7al mna3mel ma3o deal. Halla2 ana eltella la Dima ta nrayye7 rasna mna3mel three bundles. Enno khalas enta masalan Kee Beirut aw Club Soda aw whatever, btrou7 la 3ando btello khaye enta fik ta3mel ya masalan 50 dollar hal add byetla3lon, 70 dollar hal add byetla3lon, 100 hal add byetla3lon. Bas Dima 3am t2elle enno a7la ka tabloushe tkoun khalas kel wa7ad 3ando el bundle taba3o la2anno ma bta3ref enta kel ma7al adde el drink 3ando w adde el akel 3ando w adde kaza. Fa kel wa7ad la 7alo el ma7al bi7ott houwe el shi yalle baddo ye. Ok bas hon shou el fikra? Shou 3am t2elle Dima? Fikreta el awiye enno ykoun fi limited spots. Halla2 hiye aletle b-shil nsamme el app The List. Enno 7elwe bas kamen shway cheesy. So shi 3a hal asas. Enno enta gher... 3am ndall na3te example Kee Beirut. Kee Beirut gher enno masalan 3amel 50 dollar yetla3lak kaza kaza kaza, aslan fi 40-50 spot hawde henne. Halla2 bro ktir sa3be ne2dar njib 40 shakhos 50 shakhos... mesh enno ktir sa3be, la2, bto2wa w btsir. Bas ad ma fi clubs bi Lebnen jem3a w sabt w kaza enno kello 7ay-koun mfarra3 yamin shmel w fi asame ma3roufe. Bas ne7na mnsir nballesha masalan enno fi 20 spots available. 3reft shou? Mnen-sa7on yballesho bi 20. Enno fi 20 spots available. Bro shou bak? Tkhayyal yije 20 model 3ala ma7al. Bro khalas byibayyen el ma7al wel 3an! Yani enta 3am tetkhayyal 20 model ykouno 10 la 15 benet wel ba2e shabeb kellon ashkallon 7elwe w sexy w mrattebin yfouto 3ala ma7al? Ma bighayro jaw el ma7al bro hal 20 shakhos? Ma t2elle la2. Yani ana ba3ref. 20 model yfouto 3al ma7al ensa el stories kif bi diro w bi ballsho el shabeb yijo kermal el banat next time. Ma khalas ne7na badna na3ref kif nbi3a kamen. Bas ana 7abbet, ana 7abbet bro.
clips.english: And Dima, bro, came up with another very strong idea; this is something for the fine-tuning phase. This is what I'm telling you: we need to sit down and refine the idea, moving from one thought to the next to make it stronger. For example, it shouldn't be open spots, you know what I mean? Since we control the app, we'll know how to support each venue and make a deal with each one. I told Dima, to keep it simple, let's make three bundles. Like, if you're Kee Beirut or Club Soda or whatever, you go to them and say, 'Brother, you can offer a $50 tier with these perks, a $70 tier with those, or a $100 tier.' But Dima is telling me that for a start, it's better if everyone has their own custom bundle because you don't know the drink or food prices at every place. So each venue puts in exactly what they want. Okay, but what's the idea here? What is Dima telling me? Her strong idea is to have limited spots. She suggested calling the app 'The List.' It's nice but a bit cheesy. So something along those lines. Besides... let's keep using Kee Beirut as an example. Besides Kee Beirut offering, say, $50 for certain perks, there are only 40-50 spots available. Now bro, it's hard to get 40 or 50 people... not that hard, it'll grow and happen. But with so many clubs in Lebanon on Fridays and Saturdays, everyone will be spread out, and there are well-known names. But we can start it by saying there are, for example, 20 spots available. You get it? We advise them to start with 20. '20 spots available.' Bro, think about it! Imagine 20 models showing up at a venue. Bro, the place will look amazing! Can you imagine 20 models—10 to 15 girls and the rest guys, all good-looking, sexy, and well-dressed—entering a place? Won't those 20 people change the whole vibe? Don't tell me no. I know this. 20 models entering a place—forget about it, the stories will go viral and guys will start coming for the girls next time. We need to know how to sell it too. But I liked it, I liked it bro.

clips.arabizi: W akid ne7na byetla3lna cut 3ala kel hayda el mawdou3, yani mesh 3am na3mela hek yani kermal PR. Badna nedresa w nshouf w hek, bas enno hayde hiye el fikra.
clips.english: And of course, we get a cut of all of this; we're not just doing it for PR. We need to study it and see, but that's the gist of the idea.

clips.arabizi: Yani enta 3am testaweb bro enno ana 3ande shi 150 to 200 asame banat models bi Lebnen ma3 ar2am el WhatsApp taba3on wel social media taba3on. W 3ande shi 100 la 150 el shabeb. Yani oul 150 by 150, 3ande ya khaye rou7 250 to 300 shabeb banat models bi Lebnen. Mesh kellon bi-o2rabo Allah yani bas enno el 7elwin mawjoudin wel 3ade mawjoudin.
clips.english: I mean, do you realize, bro, that I have about 150 to 200 names of female models in Lebanon with their WhatsApp numbers and social media? And I have about 100 to 150 guys. So say 150 by 150; I have, let's say, 250 to 300 male and female models in Lebanon. Not all of them are 'god-tier,' but the beautiful ones are there and the average ones are there too.

clips.arabizi: Enta la2ayrak enta badak 3alam, 3reft shou? Henne bye3tebro 7alon models influencers, Elon Musk ykoun bye3teber 7alo la2ayre, houwe bro shakhos 3am yije 3al ma7al.
clips.english: You don't give a damn, you just want people, you know? They consider themselves models and influencers; even if he thinks he's Elon Musk, to me he's just a person coming to the venue.

clips.arabizi: Yani bro hayda projet 3al add kel wa7ad fina bikoun 3am bi7ott his skills. Ana bro afkar w DJ w PR wel image yani taba3 el-le 3am b-yel3ab bel ma7allat bas enno ma khass mesh deyman 7a-koun ana 3am b-yel3ab bas fhemet shou azde. Enno one of the co-owners, of the co-founders of this app DJ. DJ bi Lebnen. So enno fi 7ada ma3rouf fhemet shou azde? Fi 7ada bel image, fi 7ada bel front. Enno bi7ebbo el 3alam hek enno hayde la hayda. 3reft shou? Dima hiye el database kella wel models w bta3ref kif te7kiyon w byousa2o fiya already iza menna wassel el message. 3reft shou? Ta3a ana halla2 eb3at el message bro tlet rba3on 7ay-o2ro hek awwal el jemle w khalas. Bas Dima Bareface shaghle ma3on kellon bro, deghre 7ay-yekhouwa serious. Yani men 300 esem bro akid akid akid fi 100 7ay-yekhouwa serious. W mnsir ndall neb3atlon ne7na bulk messages, 3reft? W shou kamen? Ah w enta bro akid, yani Dima afkar w database kaza w enta afkar bro w you're the tech guy yani ok 3am t3allemna ye7on bas enno khalas bro ma 7a-yani ma fina na3mela balak 3reft shou? Aslan yani khalas ne7na arrarna na3mel hal osas sawa w hiye bro rakbe 100% yani ana bro ta ne23od es2alak w la2 bro fout fiya bro w neshteghila sawa. Khalas tletetna ne7na el founders taba3 hayda el shi. Shou ma yenja7 bi hayda el mawdou3 bro mnet2assam divided by... yani khalas 33.33 by 33.33 bro. Ne7na el three co-founders kholset khaye. Ma fi shi byemshi gher ma tletetna nkoun madyin w eblanin 3al mawdou3. No2ta 3al sater khaye. Khalas deyman bikoun fi meeting byettakhad el qarar, byemshi el qarar aw ma byemshi. Easy peasy.
clips.english: So bro, this is a project where each of us puts in his skills. I'm ideas, DJ, PR, and the 'image'—the guy playing in the venues—though I won't always be the one playing, you get what I mean. One of the co-owners and co-founders of this app is a DJ. A DJ in Lebanon. So there's someone known, you get me? Someone in the image, someone at the front. People like that, knowing who's behind it. You know? Dima is the whole database and the models; she knows how to talk to them and they already trust her if the message comes from her. You know? If I send the message now, bro, three-quarters of them will just read the first sentence and stop. But Dima Bareface has worked with them all, bro; they'll take it seriously immediately. Out of 300 names, bro, surely 100 will take it seriously. And we'll keep sending them bulk messages, you know? And what else? Oh, and you bro, of course. Dima is ideas and database, and you are ideas and the tech guy. Okay, you're teaching us these things, but we can't do it without you, you know? We've already decided to do this together and it fits 100%. I'm telling you, let's go for it and work on it together. The three of us are the founders. Whatever success this project has, we split it... 33.33% each, bro. We are the three co-founders, that's it. Nothing moves unless the three of us sign off and agree. Period. There will always be a meeting, a decision is made, and it either goes ahead or it doesn't. Easy peasy.

clips.arabizi: Halla2 kel haw afkar ktir 7elwin bas ma ba3ref adde it would like actually make money. 3reft shou? Badna ne23od ne7ke fiya yani w nfaker w kif w badna nesta3mel AI ktir baddo yse3edna. Yani baddo yse3edna bel brainstorming baddo yse3edna bi kel shi bel professionalism kif baddo ykoun yani 3reft shou? 3al add enno app 3anjad kif lazem tkoun, kif el shou bisammouhon el copy kif kello baddo ykoun el katibe. 3reft shou? Enno el osas tenkatab. Halla2 haw b-te2ed ktir easy la2anno skill bya3mellak ye7on kellon mesh mazbout? Enno kif hal add kanet hayne na3mel portfolio. I think enno as3ab neghze na3mel app. Bas enno fhemet 3alaye khalas badna badna badna nedresa mazbout bro ya3tina afkar gher 3alam shou sa2ato shou neje7o. Badna nedresa la The Secret Society bro hal app neyke ekhta bi Dubai. Yani halla2 Dubai bro akid la2anno honik el hub taba3 el influencers bas enno neyke emma el 3amela lal app yani mesh 3am tefham shou 3am ya3mel masari. Honik bro la2anno btetfarkash bel influencers wel models yani it's genius bro.
clips.english: Now these are all very nice ideas, but I don't know how much it would actually make money. You know? We need to sit and talk about it, think about how, and we need to use AI a lot to help us. It should help us with brainstorming, with everything regarding professionalism—how it should look, you know? Exactly how an app should be, the copy, the writing. You know? How things are written. I think those things are very easy now because [AI] skills can do them all for you, right? Like how easy it was to make a portfolio. I think the hardest part is making the app. But you get me, we really need to study it properly, bro, to get ideas from what others failed or succeeded at. We need to study 'The Secret Society'; that app is killing it in Dubai. Now, Dubai of course is the hub for influencers, but the guy who made that app is a genius—you don't realize how much money he's making. There, you trip over influencers and models, so it's genius, bro.

clips.arabizi: Bas ba3ed ma 7ada 3amela bi Lebnen w ne7na men tlet snin 7kina bel mawdou3 bro w ba3do lal yom ma 7ada 3amela bi Lebnen. Lazem na3mela abel ma shi DJ tene yifaker fiya la2anno bro fi ktir DJs birou7o w biyo 3a Dubai w akid fi ktir 3alam bi Lebnen w akid el models bi Lebnen bya3refo ma tlet rba3on birou7o 3a Dubai akid bya3refo The Secret Society. So hayda el shi kamen ktir awi. Tkhayyal enta el yom bro tefta7 hayda el shi abel ma The Secret Society yifakro yefta7o bi Lebnen aslan. Yani enta bro btedbasha lal app w btemshiya bro ne7na fina halla2 halla2 bi hal shaheren tlete temshe el app. Ne7na ba3dna 3ala awwal el sayfeye.
clips.english: But no one has done it in Lebanon yet, and we talked about this three years ago, bro, and to this day, no one has done it in Lebanon. We have to do it before another DJ thinks of it because, bro, many DJs go back and forth to Dubai, and surely many people in Lebanon—especially the models, since three-quarters of them go to Dubai—know about 'The Secret Society.' So this is also a very strong point. Imagine you launch this today before 'The Secret Society' even thinks of opening in Lebanon. You'd just crush it and get the app running. We can get the app going in these next two or three months. We're still at the beginning of summer.

clips.arabizi: Yani ouf tala3et ri7et basal ktir. Kant 3am totbokh sette w ata3et 3al matbakh sallem 3leya. 3am ta3melle shawarma ma3 fucking hummus. Lek, 7a-nektob kel shi w neb3atlak ma ben nshoufak halla2 hal jem3a akid 7a-nshoufak. Bas ma ba3ref b-7ess bel weekend la2anno ma bikoun fi 3aj2a Sabt 3ala rawat. Ne23od mne7ke bel mawdou3 w barke mnekfe deghre 3ala Kee. 3reft shou azde? Hek mna3mela. So men halla2 la wa2ta btkoun enta saradet shway kamen kif fik tejma3 hal afkar kellon bi shi wa7ad using AI yani w hek.
clips.english: I mean, wow, it smells like onions a lot. My grandmother was cooking and I stepped into the kitchen to say hi. She's making me shawarma with fucking hummus. Look, we'll write everything down and send it to you before we see you this week—we'll definitely see you. I'm thinking the weekend because there's no traffic, Saturday, nice and chill. We'll sit and talk about the project and maybe head straight to Kee [Beirut] afterwards. You know what I mean? That's how we'll do it. So between now and then, you can brainstorm a bit more on how to gather all these ideas into one thing using AI and so on.

overall_summary: Radwan proposes developing a Lebanese version of the Dubai-based 'The Secret Society' app, which connects models and influencers with venues for exclusive discounts and free drinks in exchange for social media promotion. He highlights his team's extensive database of hundreds of Lebanese models and emphasizes the urgency of launching during the summer season before competitors enter the market. Radwan envisions a three-way partnership where he handles PR and image, Dima manages the model database, and the recipient acts as the technical lead using AI to streamline development.
